The Real Problem

Most people have no idea where their money actually goes.

That's not a character flaw — it's a tool problem. Budgeting apps are either too complex and time-consuming, or so generic they never fit real life. So most people just don't budget at all.

You check your bank account at the end of the month, feel vaguely stressed, and wonder where it went. It doesn't have to be this way. Clarity doesn't require a finance degree or hours of setup — just the right tool built for how you actually live.

How It Works

Three things that change everything.

STEP 01

See Your Full Financial Picture

Income, expenses, savings, and debt — all in one clear view. No more scattered statements or end-of-month dread.

  • Monthly snapshot of every account
  • Net worth tracked automatically
  • Trends over time, not just right now
STEP 02

Know Where Every Dollar Goes

Categorize spending, spot the leaks, understand your habits — without judgment. Just data you can act on.

  • Spending by category, week, or month
  • Identify recurring charges you forgot
  • See what's eating your paycheck
STEP 03

Build a Budget That Fits Your Life

No rigid templates. MyClearBudget adapts to your income, goals, and real life — not the other way around.

  • Flexible categories you control
  • Built for irregular income too
  • Goal tracking for what matters to you
